subject: Trevenant, a large ghost-tree creature with a hollow trunk body, branching arms, and a single visible eye
description: Trevenant stands as an imposing arboreal figure — its body is a dark hollow tree trunk, its arms are bare gnarled branches spreading wide, and a single red eye peers from within the shadowed core. Smaller red berries or eye-like growths dot some branches. The surrounding environment is a misty forest with pale green and gray tones, suggesting deep woodland. The overall silhouette is wide and looming, conveying quiet menace. Roots extend at the base grounding the figure to the forest floor.
foreground: Trevenant's trunk body with spreading branch-arms and roots
background: misty pale green and gray forest
